name: io.github.RPER2001/rigshare
description: Rent GPUs, robots, drones, and construction gear on RIGShare; also onboards equipment owners.

environmentVariables.description: RIGShare API key (Bearer format). Required only for the authenticated tools: rigshare_list_my_bookings, rigshare_list_my_sessions, rigshare_create_booking. Without it, the four public read-only tools still work. Get a key at https://www.rigshare.app/profile#api-keys or contact support@rigshare.app.
environmentVariables.name: RIGSHARE_API_KEY
